name: OmniKit Billing
description: Comprehensive billing and invoicing system for OmniKit platform - handles invoices, subscriptions, payments, products, pricing, credits, vendors, expenses, and financial reporting

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Your OmniKit API key (starts with 'okt_'). The project is determined automatically from the key.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create a new invoice with line items, taxes, and discounts

subscription_id.description: Subscription ID if invoice is for a subscription

price_id.description: Price ID if using predefined price

test_mode.description: Whether this is a test invoice

tools.name: update_invoice
tools.description: Update invoice details or change status. Can mark invoices as 'paid' (auto-calculates amount_paid as full total), or update other fields like description, due_date, etc.

status.description: Invoice status. Use 'paid' to mark as fully paid (auto-sets amount_paid and amount_remaining=0)

tools.name: finalize_invoice
tools.description: Finalize a draft invoice (makes it immutable and ready for sending)

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List and filter invoices with pagination and status filtering

date_from.description: Filter invoices created after this date

date_to.description: Filter invoices created before this date

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific invoice

tools.name: void_invoice
tools.description: Void an invoice (mark as cancelled)

tools.name: generate_invoice_pdf
tools.description: Generate a PDF version of an invoice

invoice_id.description: Invoice ID to generate PDF for

tools.name: create_subscription
tools.description: Create a new subscription for recurring billing

items.description: Array of subscription items (alternative to price_id/quantity)

days_until_due.description: Days until invoice is due (for send_invoice method)

tools.name: update_subscription
tools.description: Update subscription plan, quantity, or addons

tools.name: cancel_subscription
tools.description: Cancel an active subscription

cancel_at_period_end.description: Cancel at end of billing period

tools.name: list_subscriptions
tools.description: List and filter subscriptions with pagination

tools.name: get_subscription
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific subscription

expand.description: Comma-separated list of objects to expand (customer, price, latest_invoice)

tools.name: create_customer
tools.description: Create a new billing customer profile

tools.name: update_customer
tools.description: Update customer billing information

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List customers with filtering, pagination, and sorting

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific customer

tools.name: get_customer_by_user_id
tools.description: Retrieve customer information by associated user ID

user_id.description: User ID to find customer for

tools.name: delete_customer
tools.description: Delete a customer and associated billing data

tools.name: create_product
tools.description: Create a product for billing

tools.name: create_refund
tools.description: Create a refund for a charge

tools.name: create_payment_intent
tools.description: Create a payment intent for collecting payment

tools.name: list_payment_methods
tools.description: List payment methods for a customer

tools.name: create_payment_method
tools.description: Create a new payment method for a customer

card.description: Card details if type is card

bank_account.description: Bank account details if type is bank_account

tools.name: create_price
tools.description: Create a price for a product

tools.name: create_vendor
tools.description: Create a new vendor for expense and bill management

tax_id.description: Tax ID or business registration number

test_mode.description: Whether this is a test vendor

tools.name: update_vendor
tools.description: Update vendor information

tools.name: get_vendor
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific vendor

tools.name: list_vendors
tools.description: List vendors with filtering and pagination

tools.name: delete_vendor
tools.description: Delete a vendor (soft delete to preserve expense history)

tools.name: create_expense
tools.description: Record a new business expense

vendor_id.description: ID of the vendor from vendors table

vendor_name.description: Vendor/merchant name (fallback if vendor_id not provided)

test_mode.description: Whether this is a test expense

tools.name: update_expense
tools.description: Update expense information and approval status

tools.name: get_expense
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific expense

tools.name: list_expenses
tools.description: List expenses with filtering and pagination

user_id.description: Filter by user who incurred expense

tools.name: delete_expense
tools.description: Delete an expense record

credential_group.name: OmniKit
credential_group.description: One key unlocks the whole OmniKit suite. Account keys can manage many projects; project keys are scoped to one.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Account API Key
credential_fields.description: Starts with okt_acc_ — operates across every project in the account.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Project API Key
credential_fields.description: Starts with okt_ — already scoped to a single project.
